case_title: SUN, JACK et al vs. BUDGET RENT-A CAR, A CALIF CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-16-1994, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON FEB-14-1995 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUN, JACK SUN, LISA HO, HIENG DAU CHEN, LEAH
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, ROBINSON, RODRIC LEE (026157), ARB-5 MAILED
NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING SET FOR 3/30/95

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, JACK SUN, LISA HO, HIENG DAU CHEN, LEAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUDGET RENT-A CAR, A CALIF CORPORATION $12,125.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,125.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO ALL PLAINTIFFS. PRINCIPAL - JACK SUN $2950; LISA SUN $3250; HIENG DAU HO $2950; LEAH CHEN $2975.
NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING SET FOR 4/20/95
